description: Tools for discovering places of interest in Cambodia (temples, museums, nature sites, beaches, markets, etc.). The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these tools to inform users about must-see attractions, provide tips, and find nearby places.

tools.name: list_places
tools.description: Browse places of interest in Cambodia by category and province. Use when the user asks about attractions, what to do, or places to visit in a specific area. Returns paginated list of places with name, category, location, and entry fee.

province.description: Filter by Cambodia province (e.g., 'Siem Reap', 'Kampot', 'Phnom Penh')

tools.returns: Paginated list of places with id, slug, name, category, province, latitude, longitude, rating_average, entry_fee_usd

tools.name: get_place_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific place including description, visitor tips, dress code, opening hours by day, GPS coordinates, and gallery images. Use when the user wants to know more about a specific attraction.
tools.returns: Full place details with description, visitor_tips, dress_code, opening_hours (by day), gallery_image_urls, status

tools.name: get_nearby_places_by_coordinates
tools.description: Find places near specific GPS coordinates within a given radius. Use when the user shares their current location or asks 'what is near me?' or 'what is close to [specific coordinate]?'. Supports category filtering.
tools.returns: Array of PlaceSummary objects sorted by distance, each with distance_meters field

tools.name: get_trips_visiting_place
tools.description: Get trip packages that include a specific place in their itinerary. Use when the user asks 'what trips visit Angkor Wat?' or similar place-focused questions.
tools.returns: Array of TripBrief objects with id, slug, name, duration_days, price_from_usd, rating_average
